banner.label: Hunter's Record - Workshop Blueprints - Blood Transmission - Precision
header.subtitle: Workshop Hunter / Beast Mentor — .NET & Angular & Symfony
snippets.transmission.title: Mentorship & the Workshop's Legacy
snippets.transmission.content: A hunter is nothing without those who came before. Gehrman passed his knowledge to us, and so we pass it on. Teaching tests a hunter's resolve, clarifies the anatomy of beasts, and elevates the next generation of hunters. For nine long nights, this hunter has guided fledglings through the code-infested streets of Yharnam.
snippets.stack.title: Trick Weapons & Technical Arsenal
snippets.stack.content: A hunter's weapons reflect their resolve. Angular is the saw cleaver of the frontend: versatile, brutal, effective. .NET is the hunter's axe: reliable, powerful, transformative. The hunt remains the same: forge applications that endure through the longest nights.
snippets.architecture.title: Workshop Blueprints & Fortification
snippets.architecture.content: Monolith, microservices, hexagonal or serverless: every district of Yharnam has its own beasts. The hunter's role is not merely to swing a blade, but to study the beast, learn its patterns, and choose the right tool for the kill. Every architecture decision is a blood gem slotted into the weapon of progress.
snippets.opensource.title: Open Source & the Hunter's Fellowship
snippets.opensource.content: The hunt is not a solitary affair. Through open source contributions and mentoring young hunters, this Workshop veteran sees a concrete way to light more lanterns in the darkness. The beckoning bell rings for all who seek to learn.
snippets.quality.title: Quality & the Hunter's Discipline
snippets.quality.content: Rigorous standards, vigilant eyes scanning for beasts of technical debt, and an unwavering demand for quality: these are the hunter's creed. This discipline keeps one ahead of the scourge, makes for sharper technical instincts, and produces code clean enough to present to the Doll herself.
